purpose: Machine-readable conformance artifact for the unified knowledge and replay substrate.

requirements.statement: UGR must store worlds, documents, metrics, concepts, rules, agents, arenas, lineages, and mesh links.
UGQL must support SELECT, SEARCH, TRACE, AGGREGATE, and COMPARE queries.
UPL must model domain modules, governance modules, and world packs.
CRF must expose replayable timeline, governance state, impact, lineage, and validation data.
The Constitutional Change Ledger must support query, history, replay, diff, impact, and lineage views.
